calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Avery Patenerer, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff, Ken W. Fung.
Attorney, Joseph Alcordo Sacramento, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Kuo Yen Won, is present.
Attorney, KwanYee Eva Auyeung, representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 705 Broadway Street, #14, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of January 14, 2008 is vacated.
